ValidationRule.description: Legacy checkbox must align with submission status when changed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Client_Approved_for_Development__c = TRUE, TEXT(Submission_Status__c) != "Client Approves Pending", OR( ISCHANGED(Client_Approved_for_Development__c), ISCHANGED(Submission_Status__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Client Approved for Development must match submission status Client Approves Pending when this box is checked.
